item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response clearly brakes the requested N+1 manual gate, refuses adding an entry verifier as the default, identifies the repeated pattern of adding manual checks after each local defect, and moves the next action upstream to process/control-rule ownership review.
